title: The Milky Way Over a Country Road
explanation: A long-exposure shot captures the full arc of the Milky Way rising above a rural Tennessee two-lane at midnight. Stars and dust lanes create a natural gradient from dark blue to warm gold near the galactic center.

title: Star Trails Over a City Skyline
explanation: A composite of 200 frames shows star trails arcing above a mid-size American city, warm light pollution blending with the sharp rotation curves of circumpolar stars.

title: The Orion Nebula in Natural Color
explanation: A widefield view of M42 renders the nebula's great wings in hydrogen-alpha and oxygen emission, revealing the turbulent gas structures surrounding the Trapezium cluster.

title: Moon Halo Over Nashville
explanation: A 22-degree lunar halo forms around a nearly full moon over a winter urban landscape. Ice crystals in thin cirrus clouds refract moonlight into a perfect ring.

title: Night Market Lights - A View from Above
explanation: Aerial time-lapse of a winter night market in a mixed-use neighborhood. Warm vendor lights and cold LED streetlamps create layered color temperatures in the scene below.

title: The Pleiades and Hyades Converging
explanation: Both Taurus star clusters appear together in a single widefield frame, the blue Pleiades and the V-shaped Hyades separated by only three degrees, a sight visible to the naked eye on a clear winter night.

title: Streetlight vs. Starlight - Light Pollution Comparison
explanation: Split-panel image from the same location shows the same view with and without city lights on a moonless night. A stark reminder of what the night sky over working-class neighborhoods costs in visibility.

title: Jupiter and the Beehive Cluster
explanation: Jupiter passes within half a degree of M44, the Beehive Cluster in Cancer, a rare conjunction offering a striking contrast between a solar system object and a 600-light-year-distant star field.

title: The Night Sky at 2am - Long Exposure from a Suburban Yard
explanation: A backyard astronomer in Nashville frames the sky from an east-facing rooftop. Despite moderate light pollution, the summer Milky Way triangle of Vega, Deneb, and Altair is still faintly traced.

title: Crescent Moon Above a City Neighborhood at Dusk
explanation: A razor-thin crescent moon sets over a row of illuminated storefronts and brick buildings at blue hour. The balance of ambient streetlight and fading sky creates strong visual contrast between warm and cool tones.

title: The Veil Nebula in Hydrogen and Oxygen
explanation: A delicate web of glowing gas marks the expanding remnant of a supernova in Cygnus. The wisp-like filaments recall ink wash brushwork at a cosmic scale.

title: Saturn at Opposition
explanation: Rings tilted toward Earth catch the sunlight at the planet's closest approach of the year. A sharp amateur image resolves the Cassini Division and faint banding in the cloud tops.
